event_comments:
LOST and FOUND: Blue NAVY sweatshirt. Green beanie. Please email info@cascadeoc.org to claim your item.
Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
Result status codes: MSP = missing punch; DNF = did not finish; NC = not competing; DQ = disqualified; OVT = overtime; DNS = did not start.
Source note: a starred time indicates course completion status was not reported and may be valid, MSP, or DNF.

Source includes result status definitions for msp, dnf, nc, dq, ovt, dns, and starred times.
Middle School Teams note: Team scoring was updated at the end of the season to correct for an error where a Cedar Heights Middle participant was not assigned to the correct school.
